nasb.text: But I had concern for My holy name, which the house of Israel had profaned among the nations where they went.

esv.text: But I had concern for my holy name, which the house of Israel had profaned among the nations to which they came.

cnv.text: 我卻顧惜我的聖名，就是以色列家在他們所去的列邦那裡所褻瀆的。

ccb.text: 我顾惜我的圣名，就是以色列人在所去的列国亵渎的圣名。
